headline: Is Datadog (DDOG) Pricing In Its Volatile Share Performance And Growth Outlook?
summary: Wondering if Datadog at US$123.47 is offering good value right now, or if the price already reflects the story you are buying into. The stock has returned 13.3% over the last week, while the 30 day return is a 4.2% decline and year to date the share price is down 7.7%, set against a 35.4% return over the last year, 83.0% over three years and 45.6% over five years. Recent coverage has focused on Datadog's role in observability and cloud monitoring, as investors weigh how its products fit into...
